changes.message: Stack multiple lineup abilities in one place and pick them from a clearer, easier-to-use menu.
Resize the pages bar and keep your height between sessions; the bar shows two rows when space allows.
Export screenshots with options to show or hide the spawn barrier, region names, and ultimate orb markers.
Strategy tiles list agents in role order so compositions are quicker to scan.
Smoother lineup editing: better migration for older saves, more reliable menus and hover feedback, and fewer stray hitbox issues.
